surprise to many people around the world. We are so proud of such
                                                                                                                    great achievement, reflecting our people’s great efforts. As a witness
                                                                                                                    of these great events, I am responsible to record my experience
                                                                                                                    through those changes in order to share with more people. As a par-
                                                                                                                    ticipant of this reform, I should reflect on the theory and practices of
                                                                                                                    this reform for making some contributions to our next generation. As a person working in the economic field, I aspire after knowledge,
                                                                                                                    especially after the road which my country has followed to achieve
                                                                                                                    economic success. With the opportunity to work in China
                                                                                                                    Development Bank (CDB) and to participate in the building of theo-
                                                                                                                    ries and practices of development-oriented finance under the leader-
                                                                                                                    ship of Chen Yuan, I will present some of my opinions of
                                                                                                                    development-oriented finance. Development-oriented finance, as a
                                                                                                                    special financial movement, has the task of policy making, but does
                                                                                                                    not rely on fiscal policy subsidies; has a market function, but does not
                                                                                                                    pursue profit; and has the nature of financial enterprises, but more to
                                                                                                                    reflect the government’s intention.
